MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT IDEX GLOBAL SERVICES INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.(301/JLW)
